question: [File: 'File Name: rest/middleware/metricsHandler.js -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: toOpenApiPath()] Can an unprivileged external user send thousands of requests with unique, never-before-seen URL paths so that toOpenApiPath() generates a unique `path` label for each, causing unbounded label cardinality in durationHistogram, requestTotalCounter, requestSizeHistogram, and responseSizeHistogram, exhausting Node.js heap memory and blocking the event loop long enough to delay block ingestion by 500%+ of average block time?
